params.name: winename
params.description: Name of the wine to look up (URL-encoded, e.g., haut+brion)

params.name: vintage
params.description: Wine vintage year (4-digit year or 'NV' for non-vintage)

params.name: currencycode
params.description: ISO 4217 currency code for price results (default: USD)

params.name: location
params.description: Filter results by country code (e.g., USA, GBR)

params.name: state
params.description: Filter results by US state code (e.g., CA, NY)

params.name: offer_type
params.description: Filter by offer type (R=retail, A=auction, B=both)

params.name: format
params.description: Response format (json or xml, default is xml)

items.docs: Returns aggregated wine data for a given wine name and optional vintage. Provides the Wine-Searcher aggregated critic score, grape variety, producer, region, min/max/average price, and alcohol by volume. This is the primary endpoint for wine valuation and data enrichment use cases.

params.name: winename
params.description: Name of the wine to look up (URL-encoded)

params.name: currencycode
params.description: ISO 4217 currency code for price results

params.name: state
params.description: Filter results by US state code

items.docs: Returns a list of merchants currently selling a specific wine, including shop name, price, location, and purchase links. Returns the first 24 merchant listings sorted by price (lowest first). Useful for price comparison, cellar management, and purchase integrations.
